evidence.excerpt: npm audit: 5 high / 0 critical; osv confirms vulnerability set and scope by dependency groups.

impact: High findings are concentrated in packaging toolchain (dev path). Runtime advisories observed are moderate (e.g. markdown-it in non-dev group).
notes: No Critical findings. OSV evidence in docs/AUDIT/raw/now/osv.json; markdown-it is runtimePath=prod but severity=moderate.

evidence.excerpt: Semgrep ERROR findings: run-shell-injection in workflow and spawn shell:true in ops script.

impact: Command-injection surface in CI/ops can compromise automation and release chain.

evidence.excerpt: 46 path-traversal warnings across IPC and file path builders (main + file utils).

impact: Scattered path construction and guard checks increase regression risk for traversal/path-escape bugs.
notes: Current guards exist (sanitize/isPathInside), but rule surface remains broad; central guard contract is recommended.

evidence.excerpt: Fresh production scan reports UNKNOWN=0 and DENY=0; review set is limited to AGPL-3.0-or-later with no new review licenses.

impact: License posture requires explicit policy notes but does not block current UI design flow.
notes: License posture is explicitly closed for current scope A using fresh production scan, notices readiness token pass, and existing AGPL source-offer policy.

evidence.excerpt: Knip reports 18 issues (3 deps, 1 binary, 14 exports); depcruise reports 0 circular/unresolved and 1 orphan file.

impact: Mostly maintainability noise; no immediate P0/P1 runtime break proven.
notes: Depcruise orphan: src/renderer/flags.js. No circular deps detected.

evidence.excerpt: jscpd total duplication 13.45% lines (604 clone blocks), mostly ops/test and non-runtime code paths.

impact: Maintenance overhead only; no direct user-impact defect evidence.
notes: Anti-dr4chevo: no bulk dedup ticket before user-facing impact is demonstrated.

evidence.excerpt: CSP/navigation/new-window/IPC/no-remote-code previously verified PASS; no new contradicting evidence in this run.

impact: No Electron P0 invariant breach identified.
notes: No mutation run; invariants are reconfirmed from latest available evidence set.
